title: X launches snooze feature leading to crypto as most-muted topic
summary: X introduced a new snooze feature allowing users to mute specific topics temporarily. Crypto content surged in mutes, becoming the platform's most-muted topic following the launch. Users actively snoozed crypto-related posts amid a reported spam increase.
contents:
# X launches snooze feature leading to crypto as most-muted topic

## Overview
X introduced a new snooze feature allowing users to mute specific topics temporarily. Crypto content surged in mutes, becoming the platform's most-muted topic following the launch. Users actively snoozed crypto-related posts amid a reported spam increase.

## Details
The snooze feature enables temporary muting of topics or accounts for a set period. Crypto spam has overwhelmed X feeds, prompting widespread use of the tool. No specific user numbers remained disclosed, but the shift made crypto the top muted category. The announcement aligns with X's efforts to improve user experience against spam. Platform updates continue to roll out rapidly under current leadership. Feature rollout began exactly one week before reports peaked.

**Location**: Global

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @XNews, which covers X platform breaking news aggregator. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following X platform breaking news aggregator will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
